opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My chest and back are covered in these terrible white and brown splotches. They seemed to multiply in the sun, and I look diseased. I have a wedding this weekend and I'm panicking.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The blotches got a lot worse and spread across my chest after I got back from a hot tropical holiday, and I'm terrified it's some spreading or catching skin disease. I can't sleep because I'm so worried about how it looks.

symptom_narrative.onset: the patches have been there a while but flared dramatically over the last couple of weeks after a hot, humid tropical holiday with a lot of sweating
symptom_narrative.character: lots of small well-defined pale spots and some light-brown ones that have joined together into bigger blotchy patches; some are very slightly itchy but mostly they just look bad
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: not painful, but extremely distressing to look at — I feel disfigured
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: across my chest, upper back, shoulders and the base of my neck and tops of my arms
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant; got dramatically more obvious after sun exposure because the pale spots won't tan like the rest of my skin
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: heat, sweating and sun — the pale spots stand out more now that the rest of me is tanned
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: occasional mild itch; no pain, no fever, feels otherwise completely well
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: thinks the skin may have looked slightly patchy in past summers but never this widespread
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: not physically limiting but causing severe anxiety and sleeplessness before a big social event

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: recently returned from a tropical holiday in hot, humid weather with heavy sweating; a wedding to attend this weekend is driving acute anxiety about appearance

objective_data_offered.value: widespread well-defined pale spots and some light-brown patches spread across the chest, upper back, shoulders, neck and upper arms; several have merged into larger blotchy areas; the pale spots look paler than the surrounding tanned skin
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: seen only over a phone video in variable lighting; the doctor cannot touch, stretch or scrape the skin to check for fine scale

objective_data_offered.value: the surrounding untouched skin is quite tanned, making the pale spots stand out; no obvious blisters, weeping, crusting or open sores visible on video
